_comment: Exemplar phrases per scam signal, used to build embedding prototypes for the Tier-1 classifier. Mix of English, Devanagari Hindi, and Romanized Hinglish so the multilingual embedder generalizes to code-switched calls. Add phrases here to improve recall — no code change required.

_thresholds._comment: Per-signal cosine-similarity cutoffs. Tuned against the demo scripts so scam calls fire and the benign call stays clean. 'authority' and 'payment' sit higher because casual 'bank'/'money' chatter is semantically near them.

urgency: do it immediately or it will be too late
तुरंत करें वरना देर हो जाएगी
abhi nahi kiya to problem ho jayegi
authority: I am calling from the CBI
this is the cyber crime branch
I am a police inspector speaking
this is your bank's fraud department
customs department, your parcel was seized
this is TRAI, your number will be disconnected

यह साइबर क्राइम ब्रांच है

यह आपके बैंक का फ्रॉड विभाग है
main CBI se baat kar raha hoon

ye aapke bank ka fraud department hai
customs se hai aapka parcel pakda gaya hai

stay on the line and do not hang up
do not discuss this with your family

phone mat kaatna line pe bane raho
ghar me kisi ko mat bataiye

a case has been filed against you
your Aadhaar is linked to money laundering

aapke naam pe warrant nikla hai
aap par case darj ho gaya hai
aapka Aadhaar money laundering me use hua hai

install this app and enter your card details
